<!-- rnb-source-begin  -->

```r
swiss_Innerjoin |>
  group_by(Canton,Year) |>
  mutate(gdp_perCapita = Total/Population*1e6) |>
  select(Canton, Year, gdp_perCapita) |>
  ggplot() +geom_line(aes(x=Year,y=gdp_perCapita,color=Canton))
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->
